questionHtml: Describe fully the geometrical transformation represented by A.
markschemeHtml:
stretch          A1

scale factor 3,          A1

y-axis invariant (condone parallel to the x-axis)          A1

and

stretch, scale factor 2,          A1

x-axis invariant (condone parallel to the y-axis)          A1

[5 marks]

meta.title: Describe fully the geometrical transformation represented by A.
